title: Various Tweaks
description: A recource pack with some QOL improvements to the Vanilla game.
body:
Just another QOL recourcepack, with the following features:
- Rainbow Woll
- Transparent glass
- More transparent water
- Better visible ores
- Glowing ores(Requires shader)
- Custom font
- Less anoying pumpkin overlay
- New brakeing animation

Knows Erros:
- Z-fighting on glowing ores
- Some ores don´t have changed
